ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "car_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each car (e.g., e2816) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Odometer reading at the time of registration */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "engine_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the GPS data */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time stamp of the GPS data */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the GPS data point */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the GPS data point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the GPS data point */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the time of GPS data */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the vehicle at the time of GPS data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumption" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel consumption data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the fuel consumption data */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of fuel consumption */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the vehicle at the time of fuel consumption */,
  "avg_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Average fuel consumption of the vehicle at the time of measurement */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level of the vehicle at the time of fuel consumption */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system performance data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the system performance data */,
  "system_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the system at the time of measurement (e.g., x0) */,
  "grid" INTEGER /* Grid value at the time of measurement */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* Battery voltage at the time of system performance measurement */,
  "engine_temperature" REAL /* Engine temperature at the time of system performance measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the work mode (e.g., ws) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work mode */,
  "mode_group" TEXT /* Group of the work mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_modes" (
  "vehicle_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-mode association */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the work mode */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work mode associated with the vehicle */,
  "mode_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the work mode */,
  "mode_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the work mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_modes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES work_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_modes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet manager, mechanic, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_vehicle_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_vehicle_access_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_vehicle_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_mode_codes" (
  "mode_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system mode code */,
  "mode_code" TEXT /* System mode code (e.g., x0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system mode code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_values" (
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid value */,
  "grid_value" INTEGER /* Grid value for system performance metrics */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grid value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the log event */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time stamp of the log event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event logged (e.g., system performance, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the maintenance record */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the insurance record */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the insurance policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_insurance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the registration record */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_registration_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the accident record */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "accident_time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  "accident_description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
